subject: [RFC PATCH 9/9 v2] mm/memcontrol: Make memory.max tier-aware

2026-04-23.patch_summary: This patch makes the memory.max limit tier-aware, allowing it to enforce a fair distribution of top-tier memory among workloads in isolated memory cgroups. The patch introduces selective reclaim on top-tier nodes based on the combination of limit breaches, ensuring consistent baseline performance by mitigating workload-external factors such as co-location and start order. The existing memory.max protection is extended to consider both total memory footprint and where that memory resides, enabling more efficient resource allocation in multi-workload environments.
